notes: Examine.com evidence summary on intermittent fasting; covers metabolic benefits and autophagy with nuanced evidence ratings
PMC review on intermittent fasting and metabolic health in humans
2025 systematic review and network meta-analysis of 56 RCTs; IF reduces weight, LDL, BP, fasting glucose vs usual diet; modified ADF most effective
2025 Nutrition Journal meta-analysis of 15 RCTs in overweight adults; confirms body fat, LDL, and fasting glucose reductions
2025 Nature Communications 6-month RCT; 8% weight loss, 16% body fat reduction, significant LDL and triglyceride improvements in middle-aged adults
Lancet eClinicalMedicine umbrella review of IF systematic reviews and meta-analyses; IF comparable to continuous caloric restriction short-term; highlights nuance on independence of benefits
